rationale: Educ. Code §29.004 governs timelines for special education evaluations. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A written report of a full individual and initial evaluation of a student for purposes of special education services shall be completed as follows
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
